attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Compositional inverses, complete mappings, orthogonal Latin squares and bent functions

nodes.label: frobSum
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def frobSum {F : Type*} [Field F] (p e cnt : ℕ) (x : F) : F :=
  ∑ k ∈ Finset.range cnt, x ^ (p ^ (e * k))

nodes.label: frobNorm
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def frobNorm {F : Type*} [Field F] (p e cnt : ℕ) (x : F) : F :=
  x ^ (∑ k ∈ Finset.range cnt, p ^ (e * k))

nodes.label: IsCPPOn
nodes.lean:
def IsCPPOn {F : Type*} [Field F] (S : Set F) (f : F → F) : Prop :=
  Set.BijOn f S S ∧ Set.BijOn (fun x => f x + x) S S

nodes.label: LInvKer
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def LInvKer {F : Type*} [Field F] (p m n r s d : ℕ) (c x : F) : F :=
  ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (s / d),
    ((c⁻¹) ^ (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (j + 1), p ^ (m * r * i)))
    * (((n / s : ℕ) : F)⁻¹ * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n / s - 1), (k : F) * x ^ (p ^ (k * (m * s * r / d)))) ^ (p ^ (m * r * j))

nodes.label: LInvKer2
nodes.lean:
noncomputable def LInvKer2 {F : Type*} [Field F] (p m n r d : ℕ) (c x : F) : F :=
  ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (m / d),
    ((c⁻¹) ^ (∑ i ∈ Finset.range (j + 1), p ^ (r * i)))
    * (((n : ℕ) : F)⁻¹ * ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (n - 1), (k : F) * x ^ (p ^ (k * m * r / d))) ^ (p ^ (r * j))

nodes.label: thm_invLBP
nodes.lean: theorem thm_invLBP : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ≠ 0 → (Function.Bijective (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ (m * r)) - c * x) ↔ frobNorm p (m * Nat.gcd n r) (n / Nat.gcd n r) c ≠ 1) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_invLBP
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_invLBP : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ^ (p ^ m) = c → frobNorm p (Nat.gcd (m * n) r) ((m * n) / Nat.gcd (m * n) r) c ≠ 1 → Set.BijOn (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ r) - c * x) {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_lem_norm_identity
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_norm_identity : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r s : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → 0 < s → s ∣ n → Nat.gcd n r = Nat.gcd s r → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → (∀ x : F, frobSum p (m * s) (n / s) x = frobSum p (m * s * r / Nat.gcd n r) (n / s) x) ∧ (∀ c : F, c ^ (p ^ (m * s)) = c → frobNorm p (m * Nat.gcd n r) (s / Nat.gcd n r) c = frobNorm p (m * r) (s / Nat.gcd n r) c) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_InvKer
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_InvKer : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r s : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → 0 < s → s ∣ n → Nat.gcd n r = Nat.gcd s r → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ≠ 0 → c ^ (p ^ (m * s)) = c → frobNorm p (m * Nat.gcd n r) (s / Nat.gcd n r) c = 1 → (Set.BijOn (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ (m * r)) - c * x) {x : F | frobSum p (m * s) (n / s) x = 0} {x : F | frobSum p (m * s) (n / s) x = 0} ↔ ¬ (p ∣ n / s)) ∧ (¬ (p ∣ n / s) → ∀ x ∈ {x : F | frobSum p (m * s) (n / s) x = 0}, (fun z : F => z ^ (p ^ (m * r)) - c * z) (LInvKer p m n r s (Nat.gcd n r) c x) = x) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_InvKer2
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_InvKer2 : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Nat.gcd (m * n) r = Nat.gcd m r → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ≠ 0 → c ^ (p ^ m) = c → frobNorm p (Nat.gcd m r) (m / Nat.gcd m r) c = 1 → (Set.BijOn (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ r) - c * x) {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} ↔ ¬ (p ∣ n)) ∧ (¬ (p ∣ n) → ∀ x ∈ {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0}, (fun z : F => z ^ (p ^ r) - c * z) (LInvKer2 p m n r (Nat.gcd m r) c x) = x) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_wu_and_lin
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_wu_and_lin : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Nat.gcd n r = 1 → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ^ (p ^ m) = c → (Set.BijOn (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ r) - c * x) {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} ↔ ((frobNorm p (Nat.gcd m r) (m / Nat.gcd m r) c = 1 ∧ ¬ (p ∣ n)) ∨ frobNorm p (Nat.gcd m r) (m * n / Nat.gcd m r) c ≠ 1)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_InvKer2
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_InvKer2 : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Nat.gcd (m * n) r = Nat.gcd m r → ¬ (p ∣ n) → Nat.gcd n (p ^ Nat.gcd m r - 1) = 1 → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (c : F), c ^ (p ^ m) = c → Set.BijOn (fun x : F => x ^ (p ^ r) - c * x) {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} {x : F | frobSum p m n x = 0} := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_improv
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_improv : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Nat.gcd m r = Nat.gcd (m * n) r → ¬ (p ∣ n) → Nat.gcd n (p ^ Nat.gcd m r - 1) = 1 → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (G : Polynomial F), (∀ i, (G.coeff i) ^ (p ^ m) = G.coeff i) → ((∀ a : F, a ^ (p ^ m) = a → a ≠ 0 → IsCPPOn Set.univ (fun x : F => a * x ^ (p ^ r) + x * (G.eval (frobSum p m n x) - a * (frobSum p m n x) ^ (p ^ r - 1)))) ↔ IsCPPOn {y : F | y ^ (p ^ m) = y} (fun y : F => y * G.eval y)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_cor_improv
nodes.lean: theorem thm_cor_improv : ∀ (F : Type*) [Field F] [Fintype F] (p m n r : ℕ), p.Prime → 0 < m → 0 < n → 0 < r → Nat.gcd m r = Nat.gcd (m * n) r → ¬ (p ∣ n) → Nat.gcd n (p ^ Nat.gcd m r - 1) = 1 → Fintype.card F = p ^ (m * n) → ∀ (a b : F), a ^ (p ^ m) = a → b ^ (p ^ m) = b → b ≠ -1 → b ≠ 0 → IsCPPOn Set.univ (fun x : F => a * (x ^ (p ^ r) - x * (frobSum p m n x) ^ (p ^ r - 1)) + b * x) := by sorry

title: Compositional inverses, complete mappings, orthogonal Latin squares and bent functions
